title: Autonomy Phase 2: Completion follow-up (goal requests re-evaluation)
description:
## Source
`Data/Pages/Tasks/memorysmith_llm_autonomy_design_2026-06-29.md` — Phase 2

## Scope
Completion events can request another LLM pass. Follow-up policy attached to goal/intent. Evaluator can request continuation. Sequence continuation limits.

## Deliverables
- Completion signal type
- Follow-up policy attached to goal/intent
- Evaluator can request continuation
- Sequence continuation limits
- Outcome-aware follow-up logging

## Exit criteria
- A goal can explicitly ask for "evaluate again when done"
- A successful completion can cause a second planning pass
- Failure can choose between retry, stop, or branch

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body:
Council review update (2026-06-29): Phase 2 requires these gates before implementation:
1. Phase 0 contract types merged (WakeReason, RuntimeSignal, FollowUpPolicy)
2. Phase 1 signal plumbing working in production
3. `EvaluationResult` discriminated union available (TSK-0243)
4. `TaskSequenceGoal` completion detection reliable
5. Continuation limits must be enforced (no runaway chains)

Scope confirmed: completion signal type, follow-up policy attached to goal/intent, evaluator can request continuation, failure can choose retry/stop/branch, outcome-aware logging.

See full report: `Data/Pages/council/blueprint-yaml-autonomy-council-2026-06-29.md`
